Loomed from pure, organic cotton, the soft, absorbent weave is designed to dry quickly on the hook or in the dryer. Unisex styling with double belt loops.

products.title: Air Weight Organic Bath Wrap - Renewed
products.description: The comfort and performance of our most loved towel, designed to enrich your post-shower ritual for the full spa experience at home. Loomed from long loops of pure organic cotton in a twill weave, whose highs and lows create the perfect texture for drying off quickly and efficiently. products.title: Lobos Organic Sham - Renewed
products.description: This cotton chambray sham is detailed with a series of stripes stitched from small geometric patterns, drawing from our founder’s original work as a hand weaver. These intricate dobby-woven details create unique floats across the yarn-dyed weave for refined texture with a lightweight touch.

products.title: Cloud Brushed™ Organic Flannel Fitted Sheet - Renewed
products.description: Fall into the restorative, cloud-like softness of thick organic brushed cotton. Discover the velvety warmth and luxurious comfort of this exceptionally cozy flannel fitted sheet.

products.title: Cloud Brushed™ Organic Flannel Sham - Renewed
products.description: Thicker, warmer, and more durable than your average flannel. Our premium organic cotton is brushed to enhance its natural texture and performance. The result is Cloud-like softness and warmth. At a weighty six-ounces, these sheets keep wear and pilling under control with wash and wear.

products.title: Cloud Soft Organic Sateen Duvet Cover - Renewed
products.description: We’ve loved our organic sateen for 30 years, and it only gets better with time. That’s why we reimagined this sateen fabric with that perfectly lived-in feeling, right out of the bag. Soft and comforting without the shiny look of other sateens, this washed, weighty duvet is the essence of our casual California lifestyle. The fabric is finished with miDori bioSoft, a USDA certified biobased softene

products.title: 300 Thread Count Organic Sateen Sham - Renewed
products.description: The softness of sateen brings a rich coziness to the bedroom with a subtle luster on one side, and a slightly matte finish on the other. Naturally wrinkle-resistant, Sateen is more tightly woven and therefore typically heavier in weight than percale, making it ideal for year-round comfort.

products.title: Coyuchi Virtual Gift Card
products.description: Shopping for someone else but not sure what to give them? Give the gift of choice with a gift card. Gift cards are delivered by email and contain checkout redemption instructions. Our gift cards have no additional processing fees.
